title: Customer Service
questions: What is the best way to deal with a complaining customer, in your opinion?
Would you like to work in a department that dealt with customer complaints? Why/why not?
Which types of businesses have the best customer service? Which have the worst?
Do you think customer service is better or worse than it was 20 years ago?
What is your opinion of customer service hotlines? Have you ever called such a hotline?
Do you think more and more companies will use call-centres and hotlines in the future?
Do you think people who work in customer service should be specially trained?
What are the best/worst qualities for someone to have if they work in customer service?
Does your company have a good customer service department?
What do you think is the key to providing good customer service?
Do you think customer service is better or worse in other countries?
Have you ever returned a product you had bought? What happened?
